author: ESPN YouTube
text:
🚨Find out why A'ja Wilson WILL win MVP AGAIN! Plus, Olivia Miles ROY Hype Train!!! 🔥🏀
Welcome to WNBA Hoop Streams! Join Sam Ravech, Samantha Rivera, and Alexa Philippou as they discuss the biggest stories in the WNBA right now. We'll look at the apparent friction between Caitlin Clark and Fever Head Coach Stephanie White and discuss whether we think this is a big deal or nothing at all. We'll discuss the players who look like candidates for MVP and Rookie Of The Year at this early point in the season. And with the Commissioner's Cup tournament taking over the WNBA this summer, we'll decide which teams we think are contenders or pretenders in a way you have to see to believe.  

00:00 Welcome
00:30 Early season frontrunners for MVP 
09:20 Early Season Frontrunners for Rookie Of The Year
15:25 Commissioner’s Cup dating game
29:10 Caitlin Clark’s relationship with Stephanie White
33:30 Azzi Fudd and Jessica Shepard playing great in Dallas
35:20 Must watch games this week
36:35 Goodbye

✔️ Subscribe to ESPN Unlimited: https://plus.espn.com/
